listing.title: Mental Health Specialties
listing.subtitle: Start from the kind of support you need, then move quickly to the specialty that fits your situation.
listing.searchSubtitle: If you know the specialty name, search directly. Otherwise, use categories to narrow your path faster.

search.label: Search specialties
search.placeholder: For example: anxiety, family guidance, nutritional therapy

listing.groupSubtitle: Choose the specialty that feels closest to what you need right now.
listing.groupEmptyTitle: Sub-specialties will appear here when they are added
listing.groupEmptySubtitle: You can still open this care path now and browse practitioners by the primary category.
listing.groupEmptyNote: This care path is already active in the public catalog even though no sub-specialties have been added yet.

empty.title: No specialties are available right now
empty.subtitle: Try a different keyword or browse all currently available care paths.

listing.carePathFallback: Start from this care path to browse practitioners and move into the right support track.
listing.carePathNoSpecialties: Primary care path is ready now

detail.subtitle: Review the specialty description, current catalog data, then move directly to practitioners linked to it.
detail.summaryDescription: This specialty is part of the public Sawiyaa specialty catalog and can be used to filter practitioners and move toward the care path that fits your needs.
detail.aboutFallback: No extended description has been added for this specialty yet.
detail.metaSubtitle: These are the current fields available from the backend contract for this specialty.
detail.categoryUnavailable: Not available yet in this phase

practitioners.title: Start from practitioners in this specialty
practitioners.subtitle: This list is genuinely filtered by the current specialty so you can move directly to the most relevant practitioner.
practitioners.cta: View all practitioners in this specialty
practitioners.emptyTitle: No public practitioners are currently listed for this specialty
practitioners.emptySubtitle: You can browse all practitioners or check back later when more practitioners are linked to this care path.
